global_description: A medium to large seabird with a robust body and a streamlined shape. It features a slaty gray back and wings, contrasting with a white head, neck, and underparts. The bird has a yellow bill with a red spot near the tip and pink legs. The wings are long and pointed, and the tail is short and square.

part_details.back: Slaty gray, smooth feathers covering the upper body.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, slaty gray with white tips.
part_details.head: White, smooth feathers with a rounded shape.
part_details.bill: Yellow, slightly curved with a distinctive red spot near the tip.

spatial_relations: The slaty gray wings extend from the sides of the white body.
The yellow bill protrudes from the front of the white head.
The pink legs are positioned under the body, supporting it.
